problem.title: Sort by Frequency
problem.description: Sort elements of an array by frequency of occurrence.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashMap and PriorityQueue
solutions.description: Count character frequencies with a HashMap, then use a max-heap (priority queue) ordered by frequency to greedily output the most frequent characters first. Each character is repeated exactly as many times as it appears, building the sorted result string. This approach generalises easily to any comparable elements, not just characters.
